name: Knock
description: Knock is a notifications infrastructure platform. Use this API to trigger notification workflows, manage users and their preferences, track message delivery, and build in-app notification feeds.

capabilities.name: trigger_workflow
capabilities.description: Trigger a notification workflow for one or more recipients.

capabilities.name: manage_users
capabilities.description: Create, update, and manage user profiles and their notification preferences.

capabilities.name: list_messages
capabilities.description: List and retrieve notification messages with delivery status.

capabilities.name: manage_preferences
capabilities.description: Get and update notification preferences for users.

capabilities.name: manage_objects
capabilities.description: Create and manage objects that can receive notifications (like teams, projects).
